libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property appears required. Tests that mock Maven 3.1 ProjectBuildingResult/DependencyResolutionResult should use org.eclipse.aether.graph.Dependency and DependencyNode; stale org.sonatype.aether imports are from the pre-Maven-3.1 fallback path and are not on the normal compile classpath.

deterministic_setup.reason: maven-common-artifact-filters 3.1.1 depends on sisu-inject-plexus 1.4.2, which brings sisu-inject-bean 1.4.2; that POM requests the non-existent org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-guice:3.1.0:noaop artifact. Version 2.1.1 uses the resolvable no_aop classifier and lets Gradle resolve the test classpath.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8666 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.shared:maven-common-artifact-filters:3.1.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The added Sisu dependency is a Gradle classpath workaround for bad upstream transitive metadata; native-image and full TCK verification remain authoritative.
Existing tests may still need source updates from Sonatype Aether types to Eclipse Aether types; the dependency workaround only gets past artifact resolution.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Normal generated tests need one dependency workaround: the 3.1.1 artifact's Sisu transitive dependency graph makes Gradle try to resolve a non-existent classifier before tests can compile.
